no: Replaces 329 BG1 TIS + 2,082 PVRZ area background files via COPY to override (last writer wins). GAME_IS bgee only — safe for EET because EET runs it in BG1 phase. CONFLICT with BGGO (i=25): BGGO covers all 58 of its BG1 areas (AR0100, AR0200, AR0300 etc.) using the same TIS/PVRZ files; whichever installs later wins. In infinity-insanity these install after BGGO (pos 1607 vs 52), so AI Denoised overrides BGGO for those areas — BGGO work is wasted. Pick one or the other. CONFLICT with BGEE_Graphics_Enhanced (i=708): that mod also replaces BG1 area PVRZ/TIS. NO conflict with SotSC/DSotSC/NToSC/1PP: those mods use entirely different area codes or touch different file types. Install order: position here (after most content mods) is correct to ensure these visuals are the final word on BG1 area graphics.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs
Conflict analysis: BGGO and BGEE_Graphics_Enhanced conflict (same TIS/PVRZ); SotSC/DSotSC/NToSC/1PP do not

conflicts.reason: Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 126 vs 146)

sum: AI-upscaled BG1 area backgrounds for sharper visuals at modern resolutions. Purely cosmetic, large file size.
